description: A university rocketry team is transitioning their proven model rocket design from low-power cardboard and balsa construction to high-power fiberglass and plywood materials for a Level 1 HPR certification flight. Using the base design 'hpr_upgrade_base.ork', upgrade the Body Tube and Nose Cone to Fiberglass and the Fin set to Plywood or Birch. Run a flight simulation to verify the performance of the heavier design. Save the modified design as 'upgraded_rocket.ork' in ~/Documents/rockets/ and write a material substitution report (minimum 200 characters) to ~/Documents/exports/material_upgrade_report.txt. The report must discuss the material changes and their impact on the rocket's mass and simulated apogee.
